title: Agent Metrics Real-Time

scope.rationale: Only 2-3 frontend files modified (AgentsMonitor, AgentMonitorCard, useApiMetrics hook). Minimal changes.

integration.rationale: Single API endpoint (/api/metrics) already exists and returns real data. No new integrations needed.

infrastructure.rationale: No backend work needed. Existing metricsService handles all polling. Frontend-only implementation.

knowledge.rationale: Follows established pattern: Hook → useQuery → Component. Team familiar with React Query and dashboard patterns.

risk.rationale: Low-risk story. No data mutations, read-only metrics display. API already proven working.

reasoning: Brownfield enhancement: wiring existing pieces together. metricsService already exists and polls. Just connect to component. No backend work needed. Follows proven patterns. Low risk.
recommendation: Fast-track as foundation story. Unblocks other Wave 5 stories by demonstrating real-data pattern.
